1889 Harbor Vista Dr, Marquette, MI 49855, USA

There's all sorts of berry bushes along this river. Follow the dirt road back and don't cross the river onto state prison property! (It is marked.) The river is good for trout fishing too. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Theres an apple tree at the jacobetti near the rocky outcrop. Looks older, apples are tiny. They taste incredible, but they dry my mouth out sometimes.
